entries.source: "Ask me questions before explaining too much."
entries.value: "Stil mig spørgsmål, før du forklarer for meget."

entries.source: "Balance school and exam prep"
entries.value: "Balancer skole og eksamensforberedelse"

entries.source: "Check my answer before giving yours."
entries.value: "Tjek mit svar, før du giver dit."

entries.source: "Create a daily English routine"
entries.value: "Skab en daglig engelsk rutine"

entries.source: "Give me a harder version after I try."
entries.value: "Giv mig en sværere version, efter jeg har prøvet."

entries.source: "Keep it beginner friendly."
entries.value: "Hold det begyndervenligt."

entries.source: "Plan my week for math"
entries.value: "Planlæg min uge til matematikmatik"

entries.source: "Use examples from my exam, project, or daily life."
entries.value: "Brug eksempler fra min eksamen, mit projekt eller min hverdag."

entries.source: AI prompts
entries.value: AI-prompter

entries.source: Ask for a tiny first task.
entries.value: Be om en mycket lille første opgave.

entries.source: End with a recap you write yourself.
entries.value: Afslut med en sammenfatning du skriver sjælv.

entries.source: For Study Plan Builder, a useful practice loop is:
entries.value: For Studieplanlægger er et nyttigt øvelsesloop:

entries.source: For this mode, the job is simple: Create a study plan around your time, energy, goals, and weak spots.
entries.value: Før det her tilstandt er opgaveret enkelt: skalpa en studieplan omkring din tid, energi, dina mål og svaga punkter.

entries.source: Good prompts usually include three things: the subject, your current level, and the kind of help you want. You do not need perfect wording. You only need enough context for the session to begin.
entries.value: Good prompter usually inkluder tre things: fag, din natværende nivat, og typen hjælp du ønsker. Du ikke trenger perfect wording. Du bare trenger nok kontekst for session at begin.

entries.source: If the response feels too broad, narrow it. Ask for one example, one misconception, one check question, or one next step. If it feels too easy, ask for a challenge. If it feels too hard, ask for a bridge from what you already know.
entries.value: If response feels too broad, smal det. Be om ett eksempel, ett misførstatelse, ett tjek spørggsmatl, eller ett næste trin. If det feels too easy, spørg for en challenge. If det feels too hard, spørg for en bridge fra hvad du allerede know.

entries.source: Make the output more useful
entries.value: Gjør resultatet mer nyttig

entries.source: Planning
entries.value: Planlægning

entries.source: Prompt ideas and a repeatable study loop for getting useful learning results from Study Plan Builder on inspir.
entries.value: Promptidéer og et gentageligt studieloop til at få nyttige læringsresultater fra Studieplanlægger på inspir.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: Lesing en AI response er ikke samme as læring. After første svar, spørg tilstand at lav du do noe med idé.

entries.source: Related learning paths
entries.value: Relaterte læringsveje

entries.source: Request feedback on the part that felt uncertain.
entries.value: Request tilbakemelding on part som felt usikkert.

entries.source: Respond before asking for the solution.
entries.value: Svar før du ber om løsningen.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Start med ett tydelig request

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Formuler matlet i én setning.

entries.source: Study Plan Builder prompts and study loop
entries.value: Studieplanlægger: prompter og studieloop

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: studieteknikk

entries.source: That final recap is important. When you explain the idea back, you reveal what is solid and what is still borrowed from the AI.
entries.value: That endelige recap er important. When du forklar idé back, du reveal hvad er solid og hvad er still borrowed fra AI.

entries.source: The best learning sessions are adjustable. This mode is tuned for study plan builder with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: De bedste læringssessioner kan tilpasses. Denne tilstand er finjusteret til studieplanlægger med sine egne prompter, eksempler og læringsflow.

entries.source: The fastest way to get value from Study Plan Builder is to give the AI a learning job, not just a topic. A topic says what you are interested in. A learning job says what kind of help you need.
entries.value: Den hurtigste måde at få værdi ud af Studieplanlægger på er at give AI'en en læringsopgave, ikke bare et emne. Et emne siger, hvad du er interesseret i. En læringsopgave siger, hhvilken slags hjælp du har brug for.

entries.source: Then add a constraint that makes the session more personal:
entries.value: Then add en constraint som makes session mer personal:

entries.source: Try one of these starters:
entries.value: Prøv en av disse starterne:

entries.source: Turn the mode into practice
entries.value: Gjør tilstand til øvelse

entries.source: Use Study Plan Builder when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Data Interpreter. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Brug Studieplanlægger, når det er den rigtige tilstand til opgaven. Hvis du vil have en relateret vej, kan du prøve Datatolk. Du kan også gennemse AI-læringsbloggen for studiemetoder, sokratisk læring, flashcards, rollespil og aktiv genkaldelse.
